g.text: position i attends to tokens <= i, predicts token i+1
p1 p2 p3 p4 p5 p6 p7 p8 ...
OUT: the next token at every position (input shifted by one)
IN: text prompt tokens (amber) + image patch tokens (the photo, in raster order)
each step fills one more patch
sequence to the same sequence shifted by one — each position predicts the token that comes next. Generation = append the predicted token
A real image is a sequence of patch-tokens; prepend the text prompt and you have one multimodal token stream. The AR model maps the input
Autoregressive generation, illustrated — in: a token sequence, out: the next token at every position
